title: Lofty 4.40: Sales Agent Digital Employee

steps.label: Open New Updates
steps.narration: This release card introduces new Lofty capabilities without forcing agents to leave their workflow.

steps.label: Explain Sales Agent
steps.narration: Sales Agent is now presented as a Digital Employee agents can hire, evaluate, and understand as a teammate.

trustNotes: Explain what the AI will do before asking the agent to rely on it.
Show that the agent remains in control of outreach decisions.
